raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Traveler,’ by Andrea Wulf
description: As presented in Andrea Wulf’s new biography, “The Traveler,” George Forster was an impressively curious, open-minded 17-year-old naturalist and polymath.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Wreck of the Mentor,’ by Eric Jay Dolin
book_title: ‘The Wreck of the Mentor,’ by Eric Jay Dolin
description: In “The Wreck of the Mentor,” the maritime historian Eric Jay Dolin brings to life a dramatic episode from the golden age of whaling.
